meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Fast-Track User Onboarding: A Freelancer’s Guide to Speed
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on repetitive onboarding. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional user flows in minutes, not days.
content.answer_block: Slow development speed stems from custom-coding repetitive onboarding flows. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid UI scaffolding and Claude Code for automated logic implementation, you can ship production-ready onboarding modules in minutes. This modular approach allows you to focus on high-value features while maintaining a professional, high-converting user experience.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and you're still stuck writing boilerplate for yet another sign-up flow. Every hour spent on low-leverage tasks like onboarding is an hour stolen from your profitability. In the freelance game, speed isn't just a metric; it's your competitive advantage.

But what if you could automate the drudgery? By treating onboarding as a modular, repeatable asset rather than a custom project, you reclaim your time and deliver premium value. Let’s strip away the friction and show you how to ship high-conversion onboarding flows with the precision of a senior engineer.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Schema
steps.description: Establish the state machine for your user journey. We need to identify key data points required before the user hits the dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a JSON schema for a 3-step SaaS onboarding flow including user profile, company details, and initial preferences.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding state machine based on generated schema'

steps.title: Scaffold the Interface
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate clean, responsive UI components for the defined steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate React components for the onboarding steps using Tailwind CSS, ensuring accessibility and mobile responsiveness.

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Connect the UI to your backend API to persist user progress across steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom React hook 'useOnboarding' to handle form state and local storage persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement useOnboarding hook and integrate with existing API'

steps.title: Add Logic and Validation
steps.description: Ensure data integrity before the user reaches the main application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Zod validation schemas for all onboarding inputs to ensure type safety.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add zod validation to onboarding forms'

steps.title: Final Integration and Testing
steps.description: Hook the onboarding flow into the authentication guard to force completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft an AuthGuard component that redirects un-onboarded users to the /onboarding route.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'protect dashboard route with onboarding completion check'

pro_tips: Always use a 'skip' button for non-critical steps to prevent user drop-off.
Persist onboarding progress in localStorage to allow users to return later without losing work.
Implement a progress bar that visually rewards users as they complete each step.
Use mock data early in the process to test the UI flow before connecting to real database endpoints.
Keep your onboarding logic decoupled from your main application state to ensure easier testing.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, start A/B testing the copy on your call-to-action buttons to optimize for conversion rates.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to eliminate development bottlenecks and impress your clients with lightning-fast delivery. Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
